title: Horizontal Bow
description: Let the bow shoot resemble a crossbow in first person view. Compatible with other resource packs that are not occupying corresponding item models.
body:
🏹Introduction
-
Let the bow shoot resemble a crossbow in first person.  
Can be used with other resource packs that are not occupying corresponding item models.  
Horizontal Bow pack in 1.8 may looks a bit different than other versions due to legacy model format.

🔗Related Projects
-
[Bow and Crossbow Visual Changes](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bow-and-crossbow-visual-changes)  
[Vertical Crossbow](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vertical-crossbow)

<summary>简体中文介绍</summary>

让弓箭射击在第一人称视角下类似于弩。 
可以与其他不占用相应物品模型的资源包一起使用。 

由于旧版模型格式，1.8 版本中的资源包表现可能看起来与其他版本的略有不同。
